/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/yolov8n_rknn.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/yolov8n_rknn.dir/src/main_rknn.cpp.o -o yolov8n_rknn  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/../3rdparty/opencv/lib:\$ORIGIN/../3rdparty/jpeg/lib:\$ORIGIN/../lib:/home/him/github/rknn_data/3rdparty/opencv/lib:/home/him/github/rknn_data/3rdparty/jpeg/lib:/home/him/github/rknn_data/lib" /home/him/github/rknn_data/3rdparty/opencv/lib/libopencv_core.so /home/him/github/rknn_data/3rdparty/opencv/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so /home/him/github/rknn_data/3rdparty/opencv/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so /home/him/github/rknn_data/3rdparty/jpeg/lib/libjpeg.so /home/him/github/rknn_data/lib/librknn_api.so
